commands.review_summary:
The PR wraps Twitch gateway `startAccount` in `runStoppablePassiveMonitor` and adds deterministic plus env-gated live lifecycle tests for the Twitch restart loop.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection on current main shows `startAccount` awaits `monitorTwitchProvider`, which returns `{ stop }`, and `server-channels` restarts any non-aborted settled task; this matches the linked live Twitch logs.
